cover: System architecture diagram: 'Agentforce Multi-Agent Orchestration Patterns in Production'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Agentforce 2.0 Multi-Agent Orchestration'. Subtitle 'Router agent, specialist agents, Atlas Reasoning Engine v2, Salesforce API v64.0 actions, Data Cloud vector search'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Intent Intake' (pastel blue): modules 'Experience Cloud Chat', 'Service Console', 'API Event'. LAYER 2 'Agentforce Orchestration' (pastel purple): modules 'Router Agent', 'Policy Guardrail Agent', 'Case Resolution Agent'. LAYER 3 'Salesforce Execution' (pastel green): modules 'Apex Invocable Actions', 'Flow Actions', 'Data Cloud Vector Search'. Central node 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Slack Approval' and 'External Claims API'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Production Controls': sub-modules 'Audit Log', 'Retry Queue', 'Human Handoff' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Narrow Action Surface for Agentforce Specialists'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Narrow Action Surface'. Subtitle 'Agents reason; Salesforce enforces deterministic execution'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Reduced blast radius with shield icon', 'Auditable decisions with log icon', 'Safer permissions with lock icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Mega-Agent Actions' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Specialist Action Contract' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: public static void doEverything(Id caseId){ update new Case(Id=caseId, Status='Closed'); insert new Refund__c(Case__c=caseId); } right column green border '// GOOD' code: EntitlementCheckAction.Response r = EntitlementService.check(caseId, accountId); if(!r.eligible){ return r.safeMessage; }. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'One domain per agent', 'Small invocable actions', 'Structured response contract'. Footer bar: 'Agentforce 2.0 + Salesforce API v64.0 production control pattern'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Agentforce Handoff Contract Pattern'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Explicit Handoff Contracts'. Subtitle 'Stop passing chat history; pass structured state'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Traceable handoffs with route icon', 'Policy-aware escalation with warning icon', 'Faster rep handling with headset icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Vague Handoff' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Structured Handoff' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: handoff('send to billing agent with conversation'); right column green border '// GOOD' code: handoff({ caseId:'500xx000004T9v7AAC', sourceAgent:'EntitlementAgent', targetAgent:'ResolutionAgent', eligibility:'ELIGIBLE', blockedActions:['refund'], humanReviewRequired:false });. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Source and target agent', 'Reason and evidence IDs', 'Allowed and blocked actions'. Footer bar: 'Multi-agent orchestration needs contracts, not vibes'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
